introSection: Wonder Mountain's Guardian is a steel enclosed roller coaster built by German manufacturer ART Engineering currently located at Canada's Wonderland in Vaughan, Ontario, Canada.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Wonder Mountain's Guardian was announced on 30 August 2013. During the 2013 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA, the characters of the ride were revealed during president and CEO of Cedar Fair Matt Ouimet's keynote address.

Several holes had to be drilled into the mountain in order to build the ride.

The ride was scheduled to open on 4 May 2014, but the opening was delayed to 24 May.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride features an outdoor chain lift hill, a drop into the mountain and a vertical drop track.

fullText:
Wonder Mountain's Guardian is a steel enclosed roller coaster built by German manufacturer ART Engineering currently located at Canada's Wonderland in Vaughan, Ontario, Canada.

Wonder Mountain's Guardian was announced on 30 August 2013. During the 2013 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA, the characters of the ride were revealed during president and CEO of Cedar Fair Matt Ouimet's keynote address.

Several holes had to be drilled into the mountain in order to build the ride.

The ride was scheduled to open on 4 May 2014, but the opening was delayed to 24 May.

The ride features an outdoor chain lift hill, a drop into the mountain and a vertical drop track.
